text: dbr-yhvh  'shr hyh 'l-hvsh' bn-b'ry bymy 'zyh yvtm 'chz ychzqyh mlkhy yhvdh vbymy yrb'm bn-yv'sh mlkh yshr'l
tchlt dbr-yhvh bhvsh'  f vy'mr yhvh 'l-hvsh' lkh qch-lkh 'sht znvnym vyldy znvnym khy-znh tznh h'rts m'chry yhvh
vylkh vyqch 't-gmr bt-dblym vthr vtld-lv bn
vy'mr yhvh 'lyv qr' shmv yzr''l khy-'vd m't vfqdty 't-dmy yzr''l 'l-byt yhv' vhshbty mmlkhvt byt yshr'l
vhyh byvm hhv' vshbrty 't-qsht yshr'l b'mq yzr''l
vthr 'vd vtld bt vy'mr lv qr' shmh l' rchmh khy l' 'vsyf 'vd 'rchm 't-byt yshr'l khy-nsh' 'sh' lhm
v't-byt yhvdh 'rchm vhvsh'tym byhvh 'lhyhm vl' 'vshy'm bqsht vbchrb vbmlchmh bsvsym vbfrshym
vtgml 't-l' rchmh vthr vtld bn
vy'mr qr' shmv l' 'my khy 'tm l' 'my v'nkhy l'-'hyh lkhm    s

khy znth 'mm hbyshh hvrtm khy 'mrh 'lkhh 'chry m'hby ntny lchmy vmymy tsmry vfshty shmny vshqvyy

vhy' l' yd'h khy 'nkhy ntty lh hdgn vhtyrvsh vhytshr vkhsf hrbyty lh vzhb 'shv lb'l

vhshbty khl-mshvshh chgh chdshh vshbth vkhl mv'dh
vhshmty gfnh vt'nth 'shr 'mrh 'tnh hmh ly 'shr ntnv-ly m'hby vshmtym ly'r v'khltm chyt hshdh
vfqdty 'lyh 't-ymy hb'lym 'shr tqtyr lhm vt'd nzmh vchlyth vtlkh 'chry m'hbyh v'ty shkhchh n'm-yhvh  f

vntty lh 't-khrmyh mshm v't-'mq 'khvr lftch tqvh v'nth shmh khymy n'vryh vkhyvm  'lth m'rts-mtsrym    s
vhyh byvm-hhv' n'm-yhvh tqr'y 'yshy vl'-tqr'y-ly 'vd b'ly
vhsrty 't-shmvt hb'lym mfyh vl'-yzkhrv 'vd bshmm
vkhrty lhm bryt byvm hhv' 'm-chyt hshdh v'm-'vf hshmym vrmsh h'dmh vqsht vchrb vmlchmh 'shbvr mn-h'rts vhshkhbtym lbtch
v'rshtykh ly l'vlm v'rshtykh ly btsdq vbmshft vbchsd vbrchmym
v'rshtykh ly b'mvnh vyd't 't-yhvh    s
vhyh  byvm hhv' ''nh n'm-yhvh ''nh 't-hshmym vhm y'nv 't-h'rts
vh'rts t'nh 't-hdgn v't-htyrvsh v't-hytshr vhm y'nv 't-yzr''l
vzr'tyh ly b'rts vrchmty 't-l' rchmh v'mrty ll'-'my 'my-'th vhv' y'mr 'lhy  f

v'khrh ly bchmshh 'shr khsf vchmr sh'rym vltkh sh'rym

khy  ymym rbym yshbv bny yshr'l 'yn mlkh v'yn shr v'yn zbch v'yn mtsbh v'yn 'fvd vtrfym
'chr yshbv bny yshr'l vbqshv 't-yhvh 'lhyhm v't dvd mlkhm vfchdv 'l-yhvh v'l-tvbv b'chryt hymym  f
